title: Strategy raises $263.5M through MSTR sales, holds 843,775 Bitcoin
summary: Strategy raises $263.5M through MSTR sales, holds 843,775 Bitcoin
briefing: Strategy boosted its cash reserve to $3.225 billion after selling MSTR shares, while investors weighed the value of its STRC preferred stock.

title: Hyperliquid sets 500,000 HYPE stake for permissionless prediction market deployers
summary: Hyperliquid sets 500,000 HYPE stake for permissionless prediction market deployers
briefing: Hyperliquid plans to require developers to stake 500,000 HYPE, worth about $30.4 million, to deploy permissionless prediction markets under HIP-4.

title: Vietnam sets fines for unlicensed crypto trading ahead of regulation rollout
summary: Vietnam sets fines for unlicensed crypto trading ahead of regulation rollout
briefing: The new rules establish penalties as much as $1,900 for crypto violations, including unlicensed trading and AML breaches, ahead of Vietnam’s regulated crypto market launch.

title: Zilliqa asks exchanges to pause ZIL transfers after suspected cold wallet theft
summary: Zilliqa asks exchanges to pause ZIL transfers after suspected cold wallet theft
briefing: Zilliqa said exchanges paused ZIL deposits and withdrawals after an exchange partner’s cold wallet was compromised, with the amount stolen still undisclosed.

title: Crypto institutions look beyond audits as trust signals falter: Hacken
summary: Crypto institutions look beyond audits as trust signals falter: Hacken
briefing: Institutional due diligence is shifting toward continuous monitoring, signer controls and incident readiness after operational failures accounted for most crypto losses.

title: Capital B approves 10-for-1 reverse stock split to broaden investor base
summary: Capital B approves 10-for-1 reverse stock split to broaden investor base
briefing: Europe’s second-biggest Bitcoin treasury company said the September reverse stock split should attract more institutional investors to the French company.

title: Russia’s parliament to hold final readings on crypto bill Tuesday
summary: Russia’s parliament to hold final readings on crypto bill Tuesday
briefing: Russia’s State Duma is set to consider the crypto regulation bill in second and third readings, with rules for investors and cross-border payments included.

title: Grayscale plans regular cash payouts from ETH, SOL staking rewards
summary: Grayscale plans regular cash payouts from ETH, SOL staking rewards
briefing: Grayscale plans to establish regular cash distributions from staking rewards generated by its Ether and Solana exchange-traded products.
